mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, cat.name AS category_name, c.entry_fee, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p2 WHERE p2.challenge_id = c.id AND p2.status = 'ACTIVE') AS current_participants, c.max_participants, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status, c.thumbnail_url, 0 AS pending_certification_count FROM challenge_participants p JOIN challenges c ON c.id = p.challenge_id JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = c.category_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS') ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, cat.name AS category_name, c.entry_fee, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.status = 'ACTIVE') AS current_participants, c.max_participants, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status, c.thumbnail_url, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certification_posts cp JOIN challenge_participants p ON p.id = cp.challenge_participant_id WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND cp.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS pending_certification_count FROM challenges c JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = c.category_id WHERE c.host_id = #{userId} AND c.status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS') ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC
